Medical Doctor.career_description: Medical doctors diagnose and treat illnesses, prescribe medications, and perform medical procedures.
Medical Doctor.job_outlook: Very High demand - Ghana needs more doctors, especially in rural areas
Medical Doctor.licensing_body: Medical and Dental Council of Ghana

Pharmacist.career_description: Pharmacists dispense medications, counsel patients on drug use, and ensure pharmaceutical safety.
Pharmacist.job_outlook: High demand - essential in hospitals and community pharmacies

Nurse.career_description: Nurses provide patient care, administer medications, and support doctors in healthcare settings.
Nurse.job_outlook: Very High demand - critical shortage across Ghana

Software Engineer.career_description: Software engineers design, develop, and maintain software applications and systems.
Software Engineer.job_outlook: Very High demand - Ghana's tech sector growing rapidly

Civil Engineer.career_description: Civil engineers design and supervise construction of infrastructure projects.

Lawyer.career_description: Lawyers represent clients, provide legal advice, and advocate for justice.
Lawyer.job_outlook: High demand - corporate legal services needed

Accountant.career_description: Accountants prepare financial records, conduct audits, and provide financial advice.
Accountant.job_outlook: Stable demand - every organization needs accountants

Architect.career_description: Architects design buildings and structures, creating blueprints and overseeing construction.
Architect.job_outlook: Growing demand - construction boom in Ghana

Teacher.career_description: Teachers educate students at various levels, shaping young minds and futures.
Teacher.job_outlook: High demand - needed across all regions

Business Analyst.career_description: Business analysts analyze processes, identify improvements, and drive business efficiency.
Business Analyst.job_outlook: High demand - digital transformation across industries

Public Health Officer.career_description: Public health officers promote health, prevent disease, and manage community health programs.
Public Health Officer.job_outlook: High demand - focus on disease prevention

Computer Scientist.career_description: Computer scientists study computation, develop algorithms, and advance computing technology.
Computer Scientist.job_outlook: Very High demand - tech sector growth
Computer Scientist.licensing_body: Academic path to research or industry
